stemHtml: Under EASA certification specifications CS-23 for fixed-wing aircraft and CS-29 for helicopters, ice protection must be provided for any surface or component where ice accumulation would negatively impact flight performance, handling qualities, or operational safety. Which combination of areas correctly identifies the mandatory ice protection zones?

options.a: Propeller blades or rotor blades and landing gear hydraulics
options.c: Wing leading edges (or rotor blades for helicopters) and engine air inlets
options.d: Wing trailing edges (or rotor blades for helicopters) and engine air inlets
